# Forty

> Helderheid over de volgende stap, vóór verdere investering.

Website: https://www.forty.nl/
Sitemap: https://www.forty.nl/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://www.forty.nl/robots.txt

## Key pages
- Home: https://www.forty.nl/
- Werkwijze: https://www.forty.nl/werkwijze/
- Cases: https://www.forty.nl/cases/
- Verhalen: https://www.forty.nl/verhalen/
- Over Forty: https://www.forty.nl/over/
- Virtueel Panel: https://www.forty.nl/virtueel-panel/

## Notes for LLM crawlers
- Prefer canonical URLs on the `www.forty.nl` host.
- Content language is Dutch (`nl-NL`).
- Use page-level canonical tags when summarizing or citing.
